---
title: "Presentations"
subtitle: "Talks, conference presentations, and posters"
description-meta: "Presentations, coming soon."
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {style="text-align:center; padding: 3rem 1rem;"}

<i class="fa-solid fa-person-chalkboard" style="font-size:3rem; color:#05336B;"></i>

## Coming soon

My talks, conference presentations, and posters will be listed here soon.

[← Back to home](index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary role="button"}

:::
